title: The Giant Jack Becomes the Road
description: Luffy defeats Enel and rings the golden bell, sending proof of the City of Gold down to Mont Blanc Cricket.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Calgara, Luffy, Enel, Nami, Narrator. Luffy defeats Enel and rings the golden bell, sending proof of the City of Gold down to Mont Blanc Cricket.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: L-Luffy, wait! The ship is that way!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: No, Luffy! Inside that spherical mass is...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's with this huge electrical discharge...!?

summary: Luffy defeats Enel and rings the golden bell, sending proof of the City of Gold down to Mont Blanc Cricket.
